entities.name: vosoritide
entities.context: Vosoritide (VOXZOGO), a C-type natriuretic peptide analog, is the first targeted therapy approved for achondroplasia

entities.name: C-type natriuretic peptide
entities.context: Vosoritide (VOXZOGO), a C-type natriuretic peptide analog

entities.name: FGFR3
entities.context: caused by activating mutations in the FGFR3 gene that impair endochondral ossification

entities.name: FGFR3 protein
entities.context: acts by antagonizing FGFR3 signaling to promote bone growth

entities.name: achondroplasia
entities.context: Achondroplasia is the most common genetic skeletal dysplasia

entities.name: disproportionate short stature
entities.context: impair endochondral ossification and result in disproportionate short stature

entities.name: impaired endochondral ossification
entities.context: activating mutations in the FGFR3 gene that impair endochondral ossification

entities.name: lumbar lordosis
entities.context: retrospective studies have shown a reduction in lumbar lordosis and leg bowing

entities.name: leg bowing
entities.context: reduction in lumbar lordosis and leg bowing

entities.name: FGFR3 signaling pathway
entities.context: acts by antagonizing FGFR3 signaling to promote bone growth

entities.name: endochondral ossification

entities.name: FGFR3 antagonism
entities.context: acts by antagonizing FGFR3 signaling to promote bone growth

entities.name: annualized growth velocity
entities.context: daily subcutaneous vosoritide (15 ug/kg) increases annualized growth velocity (AGV) by approximately 1.5-2.0 cm/year compared to placebo

entities.name: six-minute walk distance
entities.context: improvement in six-minute walk distance and potential benefit in daily function

entities.name: injection site reaction
entities.context: Common adverse effects include mild injection site reactions

entities.name: transient hypotension
entities.context: Common adverse effects include mild injection site reactions and transient hypotension in infants

entities.name: FGFR3 activating mutation
entities.context: caused by activating mutations in the FGFR3 gene

entities.name: Phase II vosoritide trial
entities.context: Phase II and III trials indicate that daily subcutaneous vosoritide (15 ug/kg) increases annualized growth velocity

entities.context: Phase II and III trials indicate that daily subcutaneous vosoritide (15 ug/kg) increases annualized growth velocity
